'''shalogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:aversio|aversio]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aversio|aversio]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shalogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shælegeth|shælegeth]] || [[word:shælegej|shælegej]] || [[word:shælegesh|shælegesh]] || [[word:shælege|shælege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shalologoth|shalologoth]] || [[word:shalologoj|shalologoj]] || [[word:shalologosh|shalologosh]] || [[word:shalologo|shalologo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shalogoth|shalogoth]] || [[word:shalogoj|shalogoj]] || [[word:shalogosh|shalogosh]] || [[word:shalogo|shalogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shalofgoth|shalofgoth]] || [[word:shalofgoj|shalofgoj]] || [[word:shalofgosh|shalofgosh]] || [[word:shalofgof|shalofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shalogotho|shalogotho]] || [[word:shalogojo|shalogojo]] || [[word:shalogosho|shalogosho]] || [[word:shalogoko|shalogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shalogoth|shalogoth]] || [[word:shalogoj|shalogoj]] || [[word:shalogosh|shalogosh]] || [[word:shalogo|shalogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shalogothol|shalogothol]] || [[word:shalogojol|shalogojol]] || [[word:shalogoshol|shalogoshol]] || [[word:shalogokol|shalogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shalogothotho|shalogothotho]] || [[word:shalogojojo|shalogojojo]] || [[word:shalogoshosho|shalogoshosho]] || [[word:shalogoko|shalogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shalogothon|shalogothon]] || [[word:shalogojon|shalogojon]] || [[word:shalogoshon|shalogoshon]] || [[word:shalogokon|shalogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shalogothoro|shalogothoro]] || [[word:shalogojoro|shalogojoro]] || [[word:shalogoshoro|shalogoshoro]] || [[word:shalogokoro|shalogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
